acceptOffer(address,uint256,address,addr.notice: Accepts all or part of an ERC1155 token offer through the trade execution module.

buyBatch(address,address,address,address.notice: Buys tokens from a seller's secondary fixed-price listings through the trade execution module.

cancelOffer(address,uint256,address).notice: Cancels the caller's offer for one token id and currency.

setTokenTxLimits(address,(uint256,uint25.notice: Sets max mint transactions each address may submit for token ids while a limit is enabled.
